evals.prompt: I just made some changes to the visualization backend. Can you run the tests and make sure everything still works? Also check for any type errors.
evals.expected_output: Runs pytest with coverage, mypy type checking, and tests both Matplotlib and DatoViz backends. Provides clear summary of pass/fail status.

evals.prompt: Check the code quality of the project before we commit. I want to see test results, type checking, and backend validation.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive validation including pytest results, mypy checking, and backend testing with clear pass/fail summary.

evals.prompt: Run the full test suite and verify both visualization backends (Matplotlib and DatoViz) are working correctly.
evals.expected_output: Complete test run with coverage report, backend verification for both Matplotlib and DatoViz, summary of results.
